visuals.title: Problem Space Representation
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Problems and Problem Spaces</text>
  
  <!-- Problem Space Container -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="230" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Problem Space
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Problem Definition -->
  <rect x="100" y="110" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Problem Definition
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Initial State -->
  <circle cx="120" cy="190" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="120" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Start
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Goal State -->
  <circle cx="300" cy="190" r="25" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="300" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Goal
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Solution Path -->
  <path d="M145 190 C210 160, 250 160, 275 190" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solution Path
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Possible States -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="230" r="20" fill="#BBDEFB" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    States
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Operators -->
  <rect x="180" y="260" width="60" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="273" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Operators
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
